title: geek out here I guess
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Sep 04, 2014 12:48 pm OFFICIAL HAPPENING GIF PARTY Epilepsy warning  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Thu Sep 04, 2014 3:14 pm Still find it hard to believe this is going down before I even own a copy of 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Sep 04, 2014 3:37 pm Thanks for the thread, SSD. Time for the calm before the storm.

[]:             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Thu Sep 04, 2014 5:54 pm Damnit, if I got in a day early I could have written a silly Evangelion version of One More Day . OH WELL, BRING ON THE PREVIEW THAT WILL LEAD TO MORE QUESTIONS! GLORIOUS QUESTIONS!

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Sep 04, 2014 6:07 pm Quoting Anno films are the best way to show your hype!

[]:             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Thu Sep 04, 2014 6:28 pm Just wondering, shouldn't this get stickied?

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Thu Sep 04, 2014 6:46 pm hui43210 wrote: Still find it hard to believe this is going down before I even own a copy of 3.0.

[]: geek out here, I guess?             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Thu Sep 04, 2014 10:46 pm Split from news/updates thread. Y'know, it would be nice to have someplace just to geek out, heading into the preview. Having fun at moments like this is what it's all about, in my view, even if it offends those more tidy-minded. The teachers telling us to keep quiet during recess is definitely not fun.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Sep 04, 2014 10:51 pm Would you like me to unlock this until tomorrow? Nobody has said anything in it lately (in terms of speculation proper) so I figured I might as well go ahead since it's all about waiting, now.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Thu Sep 04, 2014 11:03 pm I appreciate you replying instead of just deleting it... That would be nice to have in this section. I understand wanting to keep this one free for news, but a second thread for more goofy stuff could be fun. I don't even know if anyone's interested in using one for that, but apparently there was some "nonsense" earlier (which I didn't see), so maybe they do. Thanks for replying, in any event.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Sep 04, 2014 11:20 pm Can I bring my gif party back?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Sep 04, 2014 11:38 pm ...Fine, whatever. Merged it here (above).

[]:             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Thu Sep 04, 2014 11:49 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Thu Sep 04, 2014 11:59 pm GET PSYCHED!

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Sep 05, 2014 12:39 am I'm in the eye of the hurricane right now. I have my alarm clock set to 10 minutes before the trailer airs. I'm so ready right now, and SO FREAKING EXCITED. It feels great to vent about it.

[]:             Quote Post by SSJ Spartan01 » Fri Sep 05, 2014 4:04 am Words cannot describe... If the Final countdown has truly begun then I'm ready for whatever ride we're in store for. Well, ready as I'll ever be. Excited? . . Excited. . .doesn't. . .even. . .Describe It! I can't wait!

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Fri Sep 05, 2014 4:08 am About 3-4 hours left! Also, thx Warren for bringing this thread back.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Sep 05, 2014 4:15 am Even if there's new stuff to look at, I suspect that it will be inconclusive enough to feel like a huge disappointment to some. It might be better just to quietly wait and see!

[]:             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Fri Sep 05, 2014 4:27 am pwhodges wrote: Even if there's new stuff to look at, I suspect that it will be inconclusive enough to feel like a huge disappointment to some. It might be better just to quietly wait and see!

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Sep 05, 2014 4:56 am I have been riding this pain train for two years! Hopefully this will be the beginning of the healing process. (Snort) Hahahaha! yeah, Right. Anno! Take me into your glory!
